title: Initialize workspace and copy templates
acceptance: workspace模板文件齐全（含 QUALITY_GATE / RUN_ERRORS）

title: Draft kickoff questions + seed queries (brainstorm)
acceptance: DECISIONS 含 C0 问题块；queries.md 含非空关键词（可被后续 idea-brief 重写为多桶检索计划）

title: Idea brief: lock topic/constraints/audience/query buckets
acceptance: IDEA_BRIEF.md 含 topic/scope/constraints/exclusions/rubric/targets/query buckets；queries.md 设定 draft_profile=idea_brainstorm 且包含 3-6 个 query buckets

title: HUMAN approve C0 (brainstorm brief)
acceptance: 勾选 DECISIONS.md 的 Approve C0（确认 brainstorm brief 后才进入检索）

title: Collect candidate papers and normalize metadata
acceptance: papers_raw.jsonl 覆盖度达标（Lite+ 建议 >=800）；每条含 title/year/url + 稳定标识 + provenance；retrieval_report.md 记录 buckets/exclusions/字段统计

title: Dedupe+rank and produce core set
acceptance: dedup 后池子足够大（建议 >=400）；core_set 默认 100；paper_id 唯一且 title 非空

title: Build idea landscape taxonomy [NO PROSE]
acceptance: taxonomy 至少 2 层且节点有解释；用于 brainstorm landscape 而非论文大纲

title: Draft C2 focus questions (clusters / lenses)
acceptance: DECISIONS 含 C2 focus 选择提示（基于 taxonomy 列出候选簇 / lenses；要求写明选择与排除项）

title: HUMAN approve C2 (focus lenses + exclusions)
acceptance: 勾选 DECISIONS.md 的 Approve C2（确认 focus 后才进入 signals 与 direction synthesis）

title: Write paper notes for core set [NO PROSE]
acceptance: core_set 覆盖率 100%；notes 至少含 summary/method/results/limitations；不泄漏 TODO/省略号

title: Map literature signals into a discussion table [NO PROSE]
acceptance: IDEA_SIGNAL_TABLE.md 为 Markdown 表（>=10 rows）；JSONL sidecar 存在且每行含 cluster/theme/claim/tension/missing piece/possible axis/academic value/confidence/paper_ids

title: Generate a research-direction pool
acceptance: direction pool 含 12-24 条方向卡；每条含 title/thesis/why interesting/literature suggests/missing piece/variants/academic value/first probes/weakness/best fit；JSONL sidecar 存在

title: Screen directions with a discussion-first scoring pass
acceptance: screening table 为 Markdown 表（>=8 rows）；含 discussion/academic value/evidence/distinctness/first probe/thesis potential/decision/rationale 列；JSONL sidecar 存在

title: Curate a discussion-ready shortlist
acceptance: shortlist=3-5；每条含 thesis/why interesting/literature suggests/missing piece/variants/academic value/first probes/weakness/best fit/confidence/anchors；覆盖 >=2 clusters；JSONL sidecar 存在

title: Synthesize the brainstorm memo
acceptance: REPORT.md 为 discussion-ready brainstorm memo；APPENDIX.md 和 REPORT.json 存在；主文档包含 top directions / deferred directions / discussion questions / uncertainty / next discussion step

title: Self-loop the brainstorm memo bundle to PASS
acceptance: DELIVERABLE_SELFLOOP_TODO.md 为 PASS；memo bundle + trace chain 自洽；最终产物适合 PI/PhD brainstorm 讨论而非执行工单

title: Contract audit (artifact contract + target_artifacts)
acceptance: CONTRACT_REPORT.md 状态为 PASS（且 target_artifacts 缺失=0）
